title: Perform chemical tests and procedures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform chemical tests and procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule test requirements

pcs.text: Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation and test methods, reagents and/or equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation and test methods, reagents and/or equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation and test methods, reagents and/or equipment.

pcs.text: Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret and schedule test requirements

elements.title: Receive and prepare samples

pcs.text: Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee.

pcs.text: Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare samples and standards in accordance with chemical testing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare samples and standards in accordance with chemical testing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare samples and standards in accordance with chemical testing requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Receive and prepare samples

elements.title: Check equipment before use

pcs.text: Set up equipment and instruments in accordance with test method requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up equipment and instruments in accordance with test method requirements.

pcs.text: Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check equipment calibration using specified standards and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment calibration using specified standards and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment calibration using specified standards and procedures.

pcs.text: Inspect reagents required for quality issues including visual checks and expiry

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect reagents required for quality issues including visual checks and expiry.

pcs.text: Maintain equipment log in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain equipment log in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain equipment log in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.title: Test samples to determine chemical species or properties

pcs.text: Operate equipment and instruments in accordance with test method requirements

elements.title: Process, interpret and record data

pcs.text: Record test data noting atypical observations and anomalies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record test data noting atypical observations and anomalies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret calibration graphs and compute results for all samples from these graphs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if obvious procedure or equipment problems have led to atypical data or results.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.
